Article Forge

Fully automated AI article generation in one click

4/10Overall Rating
8/10Ease of Use
$27/moStarting Price
2015Founded

About Article Forge

Article Forge is a ai writing platform founded in 2015. It positions itself as “Fully automated AI article generation in one click” and is best suited for bulk article generation, PBN content, automated blogging, SEO content. Pricing starts at $27/mo.

Features

FeatureAvailable
Long FormYes
Short FormNo
Seo ToolsYes
TemplatesNo
Tone ControlNo
Plagiarism CheckNo
MultilingualYes
Api AccessYes
Team CollaborationNo
Browser ExtensionNo

Pros & Cons

Pros

  • Fully automated one-click article generation
  • API for programmatic content creation
  • Supports 7 languages

Cons

  • Quality is noticeably lower than human-guided AI tools
  • Articles often need heavy editing
  • Reads like AI-generated content
